name: Elvis Presley's Sweet Potato Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all of the well-scrubbed potatoes in a 3-quart saucepan. Cover with cold water and bring to a boil over high heat.
2. Reduce heat to a simmer and cook until potatoes are very soft, about 20-30 minutes.
3. Drain and let cool enough to handle before peeling.
4. In a medium bowl, combine the peeled potatoes, butter, brown sugar, and nutmeg.
5. Using a potato masher, cream the potatoes until very smooth.
6. In a small bowl, beat together eggs, 1 cup evaporated milk, and vanilla extract.
7. Pour the egg mixture into the potatoes and mix thoroughly.
8. Pour the filling into the unbaked pie crust and drizzle the remaining 1/4 cup of milk on top.
9. Bake at 450°F (232°C) for 15 minutes, then reduce heat to 325°F (165°C) and continue baking for 30 minutes or more until the filling is set.
